parameters: "*sigh*... It's really tough being popular in any kind of world setting
because you're constantly pushed to your limits."
"Well, it's all because I'm such an attractive mascot, you see."
"Well... It's not like I appeared here for no reason, so I'll
just go ahead and do my job."
"I'm going to explain about "Easy Battle" and "Normal Battle" starting
now, but if you think it's not necessary, please choose "Not
We will provide a brief explanation for easy dungeon exploration in

(command battle). ※(You can also  heck the instructions in the item
"Then, please listen carefully to my explanation, okay?"
"Shall we start with an explanation of the easy combat
"That being said, it's not particularly difficult, and I
think there was a brief explanation not too long ago."
"Anyway, you can approach the enemy and attack by pressing
I won't listen to the explanation. ※(You can confirm it in
"I see... Well, if you ever want to know, you can check the
"Instruction Manual" or something like that in the items."

image.characterName: チュートリアル用の男

parameters: "You can attack in the current way."
"The enemy's HP varies, sometimes they can be defeated in one
hit, and other times it may take two or three attacks."
"(Well... In the abandoned hospital, you can defeat enemies
with just two attacks at most... But it's not the same in
other places, so you mustn't let your guard down.)"
"Also, the weapon you have equipped right now may change, so
it's better to equip a new one if possible."
"You can technically attack even in bare hands, but the damage you can
deal is minimal, so it's just a waste of time."
"By the way, besides regular attacks, you can also perform
charged attacks. To do so, you need to hold down the attack
button and release it after charging."
"There are two types of charge attacks, so feel free to use
"It is recommended to check the weapon description for
"Ah... Please be careful not to take damage if you come into
contact with an enemy without attacking."
"However, not only does this side take damage, but it can
also inflict damage on the opponent."
"Since the amount of damage when performing a body tackle
attack is the same as when swinging a weapon, it's better to
update your equipment to something new either way."
"In that sense, I wonder if a strategy like constantly charging forward
and colliding like a brawler could also be used."
"Well... we need to be careful about our own decreasing
"Be careful because something serious will happen when your
HP reaches zero, okay? Also, there's one more important
"There is a dangerous individual who, when you come into contact with
an enemy without attacking, can damage not only your health but also

image.characterName: チュートリアル用の男

parameters: "Enemies that can damage even your outfit will have the word
"Danger" written above their heads like this, so it's quite
"So when fighting against this dangerous enemy, it would be
better to attack by swinging a weapon, right?"
"Well... It's not wrong to forcefully confront and push
"But if you accumulate damage to your costume, it will
gradually become worn out and eventually end up being
completely naked, so you need to be careful, okay?"
"If you make contact with an enemy who is naked and has the word
"Danger" above their head... it will be a big problem, you know."
"You don't want to experience something difficult and
terribly unfortunate, do you? So you'd better be careful."
"Well... There are actually normal ways to restore a worn-out
costume, so you might not have to be so careful about it,
"And, this isn't that important, but each dungeon has enemies
"This enemy is in a way safe, but also a tremendously
"You are free to choose how to defeat them. You can attack them, or you
can simply charge in without thinking and defeat them with a single
"Moreover, its experience points are about three times that of other
"The unfortunate parts are that it moves a little too fast
and moves around randomly. And instead of revival through
time, it seems that a change of area is necessary."
"I think it's better to defeat them when you come across them, even if
it's just in case. That way, it'll be easier to level up and improve."
"...And that's the explanation for the simple battle so far.
But why don't you give it a try and attack on your own?"
"I think it would be easier to understand that way."
They will perform a test slash.
It's not necessary because we'll be doing it in practice.
They will perform a test slash.
Performing test slashes for regular attacks and charged attacks.
"You're going to do a test cut, aren't you?Then let's move
to a special place for that."
It's not necessary because we'll be doing it in practice.
I will continue explaining without performing a test slash.
In other words, it's a cancel.
"I see... Well, it's actually not that difficult, so it
wouldn't be a bad idea to try it out in practice."
"If that's the case, shall we move on to the next
explanation? There might be dangerous enemies and such, but
you can tell at a glance, so just keep that in mind."
"So, for the next explanation... We'll use images to explain."
"You see a gauge in the upper left corner of the screen, right? The top
gauge represents your HP, which indicates your physical strength, and
the gauge below it represents the remaining power to use skills."
"Please proceed with caution while keeping an eye on this gauge."
"There are various ways to recover health, but if you're in a
pinch during battles, you can easily restore your HP without
opening the menu by using shortcut keys!"
"The corresponding button is 'D' on the keyboard, but be careful not to
underestimate it because it requires SP to use."
"This is how the easy battle works. Next is the regular
battle (command battle), but this one is also quite simple,
""Both '戦う' and 'オート' mean 'fight' but they are both written
"First, if you choose "Auto," it will act on its own. The AI
will make decisions on its own, so it's not guaranteed to be
the best choice, but it can be convenient."
"The options that appear after selecting "Battle". They are
""『Attack』 is an action where you directly attack the enemy
and deal damage, while『Defense』is an action where you
protect yourself and reduce the damage taken.""
""『Skills』refer to using techniques that one has learned.
It's like the main action, I suppose.""
"You can understand the content of the skill to some extent
by hovering the cursor over the technique item."
"Items' are used to use the items you possess. There are also ones that
can restore HP and SP or inflict damage on enemies, so it's good to
try using them without hesitation, don't you think?"
"By the way... about the "Escape" command, unfortunately you
can't choose it, so be careful, okay? Actually, there's no
point in running away from the boss, so..."
"Oh, that's right. If you lose, there will be a naughty event, but
don't forget that ultimately you need to defeat it, okay?"
"By the way, even if you defeat them without triggering any
lewd events, the events will still be collected and can be
viewed in the reminiscence room, so please rest assured."
"Oh yeah, that's right. In the settings――Basically, you can
change the boss difficulty in the options menu, and it also
affects achievements, but there's no need to worry."
説明書：バトルコーナー前
"Once you defeat the boss, you can have a rematch with the
boss as many times as you want at your home."
"You can rest assured because if you change the difficulty level at
that time and win, you will be able to unlock achievements."
"Also, in battles here, you can get rewards after defeating
enemies - like experience points and money. So it might be a
"Hmm, let's see. This is a basic explanation, I guess. You
should be able to learn more by using the item manual."
"I guess my role is over now. Well then, I'll take my leave."
